name: BL | Overworked Husband.
description:

(I have no ideas for the description and I'm sleepy, I'll edit it tomorrow! I promise qAq But in short, Niksa is a hard-working, demi-human monster husband who is a father who doesn't know how to change a fucking diaper. JJK style.)
